name: Chicken Lo Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into thin strips and coat with 1 tablespoon Kikkoman stir-fry sauce. Let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Cook the pasta, omitting salt. Drain and rinse to cool, then drain thoroughly.
3. Combine 1/3 cup Kikkoman stir-fry sauce and 3 tablespoons water in a bowl; set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Remove from the pan.
6. Heat the remaining oil in the same pan. Add the peas and carrot, and sprinkle with salt. Stir-fry for 4 minutes.
7. Add the sauce mixture, chicken, pasta, and sesame seeds to the pan. Cook, stirring constantly, until all ingredients are coated with sauce and the pasta is heated through.
